label: ham
subject: Q4 Budget Review
body: Attached is the approved Q4 budget deck for tomorrow's steering committee review.
explanation: Routine internal budgeting email with clear business context and no coercive language.

label: spam
subject: Limited Time Offer
body: Free membership, exclusive rewards, and urgent savings if you act now.
explanation: Promotional urgency and reward-heavy wording match bulk spam patterns.

label: phishing
subject: Security Verification Needed
body: Your bank account will be suspended unless you verify your password immediately.
explanation: Credential request plus account pressure indicates a likely phishing attempt.

label: phishing
subject: Wire Transfer Approval
body: Please process this urgent wire transfer and confirm once completed.
explanation: Unexpected transfer instructions are common in financial phishing and BEC attacks.
